title: Data & AI Presales - Valentin MUR
html:
Data & AI Presales / Solution Architect

Valentin MUR

EPITA engineer combining AI adoption, enterprise infrastructure, presales support and technical enablement.

Paris, France +33 6 12 23 40 90 contact.mval@gmail.com linkedin.com/in/valentin-mur

Profile

EPITA engineering graduate with experience at HPE and TD SYNNEX across enterprise infrastructure, AI adoption and presales support. Strong ability to translate technical topics such as LLMs, RAG, GPU infrastructure and enterprise data workflows into clear use cases, demonstrations, POCs and partner enablement materials. Positioned for roles in Data & AI presales, AI solution architecture, AI adoption and technical consulting.

Key Strengths

  • AI & GenAI: LLM, RAG, chatbots, AI agents, enterprise AI use cases, POC support and model adaptation concepts.
  • Solution architecture: need qualification, infrastructure sizing, technical documentation and business-value translation.
  • Client-facing enablement: partner workshops, demonstrations, technical vulgarization and support to sales teams.

Professional Experience

AI Solutions & Enablement Specialist

TD SYNNEX, Courbevoie, France

2025 - Present

  • Support the development of AI adoption initiatives by helping partners move from AI interest to concrete enterprise use cases, demonstrations and POC discussions.
  • Work on GenAI topics including LLMs, RAG, chatbots, AI agents, enterprise data and model adaptation, with demonstrations based on fine-tuned or enterprise-contextualized models.
  • Design and explain HPE/NVIDIA GPU infrastructure for AI workloads, covering server sizing, inference constraints, on-premise or hybrid deployment options and business value.
  • Create partner-facing materials, workshops and technical narratives to make AI, data and infrastructure topics accessible to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Pre-Sales Infrastructure Engineer

Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Paris, France

2021 - 2025

  • Supported sales teams and clients in qualifying needs and designing complete HPE server, storage, virtualization and hybrid infrastructure configurations.
  • Contributed to 150+ infrastructure architectures and technical responses, including VMware-oriented environments, solution sizing, documentation and RFP support.
  • Translated customer requirements into concrete technical architectures and clear commercial arguments for sales teams and non-specialist stakeholders.
  • Built a solid foundation in enterprise IT environments, including infrastructure constraints, data confidentiality, governance and secure deployment awareness.

Private Tutor - High and Middle Schools

Parkours, Paris, France

2020 - 2022

Developed pedagogy, group management and the ability to explain complex topics clearly to different audiences.

Skills

AI & GenAI

LLMs, RAG, Chatbots, AI Agents, GenAI Use Cases, POCs, Fine-tuning Concepts, Enterprise AI Adoption

Infrastructure & Platforms

HPE Servers, NVIDIA GPU, Server Sizing, Storage, VMware, Virtualization, On-premise AI, Hybrid Infrastructure

Presales & Consulting

Solution Architecture, Need Qualification, RFP Support, Partner Enablement, Workshops, Demos, Technical Storytelling

Project & Product Delivery

Agile Methods, Project Coordination, Stakeholder Management, Roadmap Support, Documentation, Reporting

Programming & Integration

Python, SQL, APIs, Node.js, Automation, Git, Linux/Unix, Technical Prototyping

Governance & Security Awareness

Data Confidentiality, Secure AI Deployment, Risk Awareness, Compliance Mindset, IAM Awareness

Education

Master's Degree in Computer Engineering

EPITA, Paris, France

2019 - 2024

Specialization: Systems, Networks and Cybersecurity, with software engineering and project-based learning.

Key projects: Agile software development, project management, LLM/RAG prototyping and technical documentation.

Languages

  • English: Fluent (C1), TOEIC 920
  • Italian: Intermediate (B2)
